title: Devy's Descendant
description: Have you heard about Devy's Origin? It introduces a whole new level of gameplay.
body:
# Devy's Descendant

Embrace the darkness and become one with the shadows in "Devy's Descendant" A unique Minecraft origin mod. As a descendant of Devy, you possess powerful abilities that make you a formidable force in the dark, but with these strengths come significant challenges that will test your survival skills. Use this form to give me feedback
[Feedback](https://forms.gle/V1smenFpPSQe3YLWA)


**Gameplay Experience**: "Devy's Descendant" offers a challenging and immersive experience, where survival hinges on your ability to navigate the world of Minecraft under the cover of darkness. Avoid sunlight, make the most of your powerful abilities, and master the art of thriving in the shadows.


<details>
<summary>Requirements</summary>
Origin

Pehkui
</details>



# Key Features:

- Shadow Empowerment: When not exposed to sunlight, break blocks 50% faster and become translucent, blending into the shadows.
- Night Vision: See clearly in the darkest of places, making nighttime and underground exploration a breeze.
  
- Phasing: Phase through walls and obstacles for up to 10 seconds, and take flight during this time. A 5-second cooldown ensures you use this ability strategically.
  
- Portable Crafting: Access a crafting bench anytime, anywhere, allowing you to craft on the go without the need for a physical bench.
  
- Additional Storage: Gain access to an extra 9-slot inventory that you can open anywhere, providing convenient storage space for your adventures.



# Challenges:
  
- Sunlight Weakness: Beware the light! Exposure to sunlight will burn you, making surface exploration during the day a dangerous endeavor.
  
- Fragile Health: With only 7 hearts, you are more vulnerable to damage, requiring you to be cautious and strategic in combat.
  
- Restricted Diet: Your connection to the earth dictates your diet—you can only consume stone, iron ingots, gold ingots, and diamonds. Each provides specific levels of hunger and saturation, making resource management crucial.

# Diet Details:
- Stone: 6 blocks for 1 hunger and 0.25 saturation.

- Copper: 1 ingots for 1 hunger and 0.5 saturation.

- Iron Ingot: 2 ingots for 2 hunger and 1 saturation.

- Gold Ingot: 1 ingot for 3 hunger and 1.5 saturation.

- Emerald: 1 emerald for 5 hunger and 4.5 saturation.

- Diamond: 1 diamond for 5 hunger and 3 saturation.
